message:
fix(codegen): reorder VALUES to table-schema order for explicit column lists

When INSERT has an explicit column list in non-schema order (e.g.
INSERT INTO t(name, id) VALUES ('x', 42)), MakeRecord was packing
fields in VALUES order rather than table-schema order. This caused
incorrect record storage and wrong SELECT results.

Now codegen_insert() builds a column map and reorders each VALUES row
to table-schema order before passing to codegen_insert_values(). For
INSERT ... SELECT, the IPK index remapping is preserved separately.

Adds build_column_map() helper and 2 new integration tests:
ipk_column_list_reorder, ipk_column_list_omit_ipk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
